steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student wants to identify the real author—which means providing the actual name of who wrote the novel, not just describing the pseudonym situation.

steps.title: Apply the requirement to each choice
steps.content: A names Mary Ann Evans as the real author and explains how she used the pseudonym George Eliot. The other choices describe only the pseudonym or mention an unnamed woman, without identifying who the real author actually was. That matches choice A — A is correct.
